query.sql: select rowid, country, country_long, name, gppd_idnr, capacity_mw, latitude, longitude, primary_fuel, other_fuel1, other_fuel2, other_fuel3, commissioning_year, owner, source, url, geolocation_source, wepp_id, year_of_capacity_data, generation_gwh_2013, generation_gwh_2014, generation_gwh_2015, generation_gwh_2016, generation_gwh_2017, generation_data_source, estimated_generation_gwh from [global-power-plants] where "country_long" = :p0 order by estimated_generation_gwh limit 101
